src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:export const LanguageProvider: React.FC<{ children: ReactNode }> = ({ children }) => {
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  const [language, setLanguage] = useState<Language>(() => {
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    const saved = safeLocalStorage.getItem('kadi_language');
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    return (saved as Language) || 'sw';
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  });
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    safeLocalStorage.setItem('kadi_language', language);
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  }, [language]);
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  const t = (key: TranslationKey, fallback?: string): string => {
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    const section = TRANSLATIONS[language];
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    if (section && section[key]) {
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:      return section[key];
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    }
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    return fallback || key;
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  };
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  return (
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    <LanguageContext.Provider value={{ language, setLanguage, t }}>
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:      {children}
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    </LanguageContext.Provider>
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  );
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:};
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:export const useLanguage = () => {
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  const context = useContext(LanguageContext);
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  if (!context) {
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:    throw new Error('useLanguage must be used within a LanguageProvider');
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  }
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:  return context;
src/context/LanguageContext.tsx:};

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        if (width > maxW) {

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        canvas.width = width;

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:  // Canvas drawing tool designed specifically for Pledge Cards
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:  const drawContributionCardToCanvas = (
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:    canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:    evt: EventDetails,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:    tpl: ContributionCardTemplate,

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:    const h = canvas.height;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:    const renderOverlays = () => {

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        const gY = ((tpl.guestNameY || 34) / 100) * h;

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:    };

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:    function drawFallback() {

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              name,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              phone,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              cardType: allowedCategory,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              code: 'NW-' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000) + '-' + i,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              smsStatus: 'Sijatuma',
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              whatsappStatus: 'Sijatuma',
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              rsvpStatus: 'Bado',
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              rsvpGuestsCount: 0,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              checkedIn: false,

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              paidAmount,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              pledgeStatus: (() => {

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:                if (paidAmount > 0) return 'Partially Paid';

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      if (newGuests.length === 0) return;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      setIsChunkUploading(true);
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      setChunkUploadProgress(1); // Explicitly start counting from 1% as requested
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      setChunkUploadedCount({ current: 0, total: newGuests.length });
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      setChunkUploadError(null);
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      setLastUploadedGuestName('');
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      // Adjust chunk sizes dynamically to feel super premium
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      let BATCH_SIZE = 15;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      if (newGuests.length <= 10) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        BATCH_SIZE = 1; // 1 by 1 for small lists, elegant counting
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      } else if (newGuests.length <= 30) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        BATCH_SIZE = 3;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      } else if (newGuests.length <= 100) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        BATCH_SIZE = 10;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      } else if (newGuests.length <= 500) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        BATCH_SIZE = 25;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      } else {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        BATCH_SIZE = 50; // default for very large lists
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      const totalToUpload = newGuests.length;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      let currentMerged = [...guests];
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      try {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        let currentProgressVal = 1;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        for (let i = 0; i < totalToUpload; i += BATCH_SIZE) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          const batch = newGuests.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          currentMerged = [...batch, ...currentMerged];
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          if (batch.length > 0) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            setLastUploadedGuestName(batch[batch.length - 1].name || '');
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          const payload = {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            guests: batch,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            auditLog: {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              id: 'log-' + Date.now() + '-' + i,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              user: 'Admin',
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              action: `Upakiaji Mkubwa wa CSV: Wageni wapya ${i + 1} hadi ${Math.min(i + batch.length, totalToUpload)} kati ya ${totalToUpload}`,
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              details: `Kundi la mchango lilipakiwa na kusajiliwa salama kwenye PostgreSQL dpg.`
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          };
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          const response = await fetch('/api/state', {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            method: 'POST',
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            body: JSON.stringify(payload),
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          });
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          if (!response.ok) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:              ? `Failed to upload batch starting at ${i + 1}`

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          const loadedCount = Math.min(i + BATCH_SIZE, totalToUpload);
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          const targetPercent = Math.min(Math.round((loadedCount / totalToUpload) * 100), 99);
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          // Smoothly tick the visual progress with sequential counts
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          const stepDelay = Math.max(4, Math.min(35, 180 / (targetPercent - currentProgressVal || 1)));
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          for (let p = currentProgressVal; p <= targetPercent; p++) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            setChunkUploadProgress(p);
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            currentProgressVal = p;
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, stepDelay));
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          setChunkUploadedCount({ current: loadedCount, total: totalToUpload });
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          // Tiny pacing delay to show name before proceeding to next batch
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        // Smoothly complete ticker to 100%
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        for (let p = currentProgressVal; p <= 100; p++) {
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          setChunkUploadProgress(p);
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 15));
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        }
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        setChunkUploadedCount({ current: totalToUpload, total: totalToUpload });
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 850));
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:        // Trigger local updates

src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:
src/components/ContributionManager.tsx:      } catch (err: any) {

src/components/EventReports.tsx:  // Financial Metrics
src/components/EventReports.tsx:  const fundraisingTarget = event.fundraisingGoal || 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:  const metrics = useMemo(() => {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    let pledgedSum = 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    let paidSum = 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    guests.forEach(g => {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      pledgedSum += g.pledgeAmount || 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      paidSum += g.paidAmount || 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    });
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    return {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      totalPledgedAmount: pledgedSum,
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      totalPaidAmount: paidSum,
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      outstandingBalance: Math.max(0, pledgedSum - paidSum)
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    };
src/components/EventReports.tsx:  }, [guests]);
src/components/EventReports.tsx:
src/components/EventReports.tsx:  // Filters categories for listing

src/components/EventReports.tsx:    return guests.filter(g => {

src/components/EventReports.tsx:                            (g.phone && g.phone.includes(searchQuery)) ||
src/components/EventReports.tsx:                            (g.category && g.category.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()));
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      if (!matchesSearch) return false;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      if (selectedReport === 'Overall') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return true;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else if (selectedReport === 'Attendance_Only') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return g.checkedIn;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else if (selectedReport === 'RSVP_Only') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return g.rsvpStatus && g.rsvpStatus !== 'Bado';
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else if (selectedReport === 'RSVP_Pending') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return !g.rsvpStatus || g.rsvpStatus === 'Bado';
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else if (selectedReport === 'Outstanding') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return (g.pledgeAmount || 0) > (g.paidAmount || 0);
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else if (selectedReport === 'FullyPaid') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return (g.pledgeAmount || 0) > 0 && (g.paidAmount || 0) >= (g.pledgeAmount || 0);
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else if (selectedReport === 'Pledges') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return (g.pledgeAmount || 0) > 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else if (selectedReport === 'NoPledge') {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        return (g.pledgeAmount || 0) === 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      }
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      return true;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    });

src/components/EventReports.tsx:  // Group level summaries matching standard template
src/components/EventReports.tsx:  const groupSummaries = useMemo(() => {
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    const list: { name: string; count: number; pledged: number; collected: number; balances: number }[] = [];

src/components/EventReports.tsx:      let p = 0, c = 0;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      sub.forEach(g => { p += (g.pledgeAmount || 0); c += (g.paidAmount || 0); });
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      const bal = Math.max(0, p - c);

src/components/EventReports.tsx:      list.push({
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        name: cat.toUpperCase(),
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        count: sub.length,
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        pledged: p,
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        collected: c,
src/components/EventReports.tsx:        balances: bal
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      });
src/components/EventReports.tsx:
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      totals.count += sub.length;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      totals.pledged += p;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      totals.collected += c;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      totals.balances += bal;
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    });
src/components/EventReports.tsx:
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    return { list, totals };

src/components/EventReports.tsx:        } else if (paid > 0) {

src/components/EventReports.tsx:          unpaidPledgeCount++;

src/components/EventReports.tsx:        }
src/components/EventReports.tsx:      } else {

src/components/EventReports.tsx:      }
src/components/EventReports.tsx:    });

src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                <div className="flex flex-col space-y-2">
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  <input 
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    type="file"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    id="event-img-upload"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    accept="image/*"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    className="hidden"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    onChange={(e) => {
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      if (file) {
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        const reader = new FileReader();
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        reader.onload = (event) => {
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                          const dataUrl = event.target?.result as string;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                          if (dataUrl) {
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                            const img = new Image();
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                            img.onload = () => {
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              let width = img.width;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              let height = img.height;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              const maxW = 850;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              if (width > maxW) {
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                                height = (maxW / width) * height;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                                width = maxW;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              }
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              canvas.width = width;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              canvas.height = height;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              ctx?.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              const compressedDataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.7);
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                              setFormData({ ...formData, eventImgUrl: compressedDataUrl });
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                            };
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                            img.src = dataUrl;
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                          }
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        };
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      }
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    }}
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  />
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  <label 
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    htmlFor="event-img-upload"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    className="px-4 py-2.5 bg-blue-600/20 hover:bg-blue-600/30 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-xl text-blue-300 font-bold text-[10px] cursor-pointer transition flex items-center justify-center space-x-2"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  >
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4 16v1a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-1m-4-8l-4-4m0 0L8 8m4-4v12" />
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    </svg>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    <span>{formData.eventImgUrl ? t('form.btnChange') : t('form.btnUpload')}</span>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  </label>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  {formData.eventImgUrl && (
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center px-1">
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      <span className="text-[9px] text-blue-400 font-bold">✓ Picha imepakiwa</span>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      <button
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        type="button"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        onClick={() => setFormData({ ...formData, eventImgUrl: undefined })}
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        className="text-rose-400 hover:text-rose-300 text-[9px] font-bold underline cursor-pointer"
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      >
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                        {language === 'sw' ? 'Futa' : 'Remove'}
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                      </button>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                    </div>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  )}
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                </div>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 leading-relaxed italic border-l-2 border-blue-500/30 pl-2 mt-2">
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                  {t('form.eventCoverHint')}
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:                </p>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:              </div>
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:
src/components/EventDetailsForm.tsx:              {/* Preview Box */}

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      if (type === 'success') {

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const osc1 = ctx.createOscillator();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const gain1 = ctx.createGain();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        osc1.type = 'triangle';
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        osc1.frequency.setValueAtTime(523.25, now); // C5
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        gain1.gain.setValueAtTime(0.15, now);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        gain1.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, now + 0.15);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        osc1.connect(gain1);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        gain1.connect(ctx.destination);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        osc1.start(now);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        osc1.stop(now + 0.15);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const osc2 = ctx.createOscillator();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const gain2 = ctx.createGain();

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const gain = ctx.createGain();

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:  const matchGuestFromScannedText = (scannedText: string) => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    if (!scannedText) return null;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    let text = scannedText.trim();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    // 1. Try to parse as URL to extract the real guest code/id if scanned from a browser link
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    try {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      if (text.toLowerCase().includes('?invite=') || text.toLowerCase().includes('&invite=')) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const urlP = new URL(text);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const inviteParam = urlP.searchParams.get('invite');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (inviteParam) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          text = inviteParam.trim();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      } else if (text.startsWith('http://') || text.startsWith('https://')) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const urlP = new URL(text);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const pathname = urlP.pathname;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const lastSegment = pathname.substring(pathname.lastIndexOf('/') + 1);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (lastSegment) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          text = lastSegment.trim();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      console.warn("Scan string is not a valid URL URL parsing skipped, using raw:", e);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    // 2. Normalize and check prefixes
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    let cleaned = text.toUpperCase();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    if (cleaned.startsWith('EVENTCARD-')) {

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      cleaned = cleaned.substring('EVENTCARD-'.length);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    // First pass: strict exact match (highest speed & safety level)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    const exactMatch = guestsRef.current.find(g => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      const gId = g.id ? g.id.toUpperCase() : '';
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      const gCode = g.code ? g.code.toUpperCase() : '';
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      return gId === cleaned || gCode === cleaned;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    if (exactMatch) return exactMatch;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    // Second pass: robust fallback substring matching (only for strings of length >= 4 to avoid false matches on short IDs)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    return guestsRef.current.find(g => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      const gId = g.id ? g.id.toUpperCase() : '';
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      const gCode = g.code ? g.code.toUpperCase() : '';
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      return (
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        gId === cleaned ||
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        gCode === cleaned ||
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        (gId && gId.length >= 4 && cleaned.includes(gId)) ||
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        (gCode && gCode.length >= 4 && cleaned.includes(gCode)) ||
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        (gId && cleaned.length >= 4 && gId.includes(cleaned)) ||
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        (gCode && cleaned.length >= 4 && gCode.includes(cleaned))
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      );
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:  };

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:  const handleImageUploadAndScan = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    if (!file) return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    reader.onload = (event) => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      const img = new Image();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      img.onload = () => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        try {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // Draw to temporary canvas for decoding
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          if (!ctx) return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // Limit resolution for speed and compatibility, say max 800px

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          let w = img.width;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          let h = img.height;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          if (w > maxDim || h > maxDim) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            const ratio = w / h;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            if (w > h) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              w = maxDim;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              h = Math.round(maxDim / ratio);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            } else {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              h = maxDim;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              w = Math.round(maxDim * ratio);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          canvas.width = w;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          canvas.height = h;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          const qrCode = jsQR(imageData.data, imageData.width, imageData.height, {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            inversionAttempts: 'attemptBoth'
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          });

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:  // Start / Stop camera stream depending on activeTab and manual retries
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    let active = true;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    let animationFrameId: number;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    const stopActiveStream = () => {

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // Stop any currently running stream to release the camera hardware
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        stopActiveStream();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (!navigator.mediaDevices || !navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia) {

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // Define highly robust and lightweight constraint cascades to prevent OverconstrainedError or hardware locks on mobile devices
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const constraintSets: MediaStreamConstraints[] = [];
src/components/QRScanner.tsx: 
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (selectedDeviceId) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // If a specific camera is user-selected, explicitly attempt it first
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            video: { deviceId: { exact: selectedDeviceId } }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            video: { deviceId: { ideal: selectedDeviceId } }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx: 
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // 1. Force back-facing environment mode (highly compatible with standard modern phones)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          video: { facingMode: 'environment' }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // 2. Try environment as exact constraints object (often needed on strict iOS/Safari setups)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          video: { facingMode: { exact: 'environment' } }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // 3. Try environment ideal facing mode
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          video: { facingMode: { ideal: 'environment' } }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // 4. Try environment with lightweight resolutions to skip chip/hardware bottlenecks
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          video: {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            facingMode: 'environment',
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            width: { ideal: 640 },
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            height: { ideal: 480 }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // 5. Try environment at ultra-low resolution (budget mobile fail-safe)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          video: {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            facingMode: 'environment',
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            width: { ideal: 320 },
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            height: { ideal: 240 }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx: 
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // 6. Last-resort fallback for any available camera (e.g. desktop/laptop)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        constraintSets.push({
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          video: true
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx: 
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        let stream: MediaStream | null = null;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        let lastError: any = null;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx: 
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // Attempt user media cascades sequentially with a small hardware recovery breather
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        for (let i = 0; i < constraintSets.length; i++) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          const constraints = constraintSets[i];
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          try {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            if (!active) return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            console.log(`Cascade attempt ${i + 1}/${constraintSets.length} with constraints:`, constraints);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            const resStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia(constraints);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            if (!active) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              if (resStream) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                resStream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            stream = resStream;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            if (stream) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              console.log('Camera stream initialized successfully on cascade:', i + 1);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              break;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          } catch (err: any) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            console.warn(`Cascade ${i + 1} failed:`, err);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            lastError = err;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            // Give the browser hardware 100ms breather to fully close locks before trying next cascade
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (!active) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          if (stream) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop());
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (!stream) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // If all cascades failed, throw the detailed last exception rather than a generic string
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          if (lastError) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            throw lastError;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          throw new Error('NotAllowedError');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        // Store the successfully acquired stream in the ref so the cleanup function can stop it anytime
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        activeStreamRef.current = stream;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (videoRef.current && stream) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // CRITICAL REACT SAFARI WORKAROUND: Explicitly set the DOM properties
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // before assigning srcObject. This overrides React JSX translation bugs 
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // that can stall or reject raw webcam stream autoplay on iOS browsers.
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          videoRef.current.muted = true;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          videoRef.current.playsInline = true;

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            await videoRef.current.play();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          } catch (playErr) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            console.warn('Autoplay / silent play promise interrupted or rejected (benign in iframes):', playErr);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          if (active) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            setCameraActive(true);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            cameraActiveRef.current = true;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // Once permission is granted and stream starts, enumerate all cameras for selection dropdown
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          try {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            if (navigator.mediaDevices && navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              const allDevices = await navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              const videoInputs = allDevices.filter(d => d.kind === 'videoinput');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              if (active) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                setDevices(prev => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  const prevKeys = prev.map(d => d.deviceId).join(',');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  const nextKeys = videoInputs.map(d => d.deviceId).join(',');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  if (prevKeys !== nextKeys) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                    return videoInputs;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  return prev;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          } catch (enumErr) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            console.warn('Could not enumerate video inputs:', enumErr);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      } catch (err: any) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        console.warn('Media capture error details:', err);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (active) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          setCameraActive(false);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          cameraActiveRef.current = false;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    // QR detection loop using jsQR
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:    const scanQRCodeLoop = () => {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      if (!active) return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      // Increment frame count
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      frameCountRef.current++;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      // Frame skip: Only scan every 4th frame to reduce CPU load while maintaining fast response
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      if (frameCountRef.current % 4 !== 0) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(scanQRCodeLoop);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:         return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      try {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        const video = videoRef.current;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        if (video && video.readyState >= 2 && cameraActiveRef.current && !isProcessingRef.current) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          // Initialize memory-only canvas if not already defined
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          if (!offscreenCanvasRef.current) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            offscreenCanvasRef.current = document.createElement('canvas');
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          const canvas = offscreenCanvasRef.current;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          if (ctx) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            // Keep analysis canvas resolution small (e.g. max dimension 480px)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            // This prevents mobile devices from choking/hanging and ensures lightning-fast decoding
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            const maxDimension = 480;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            let w = video.videoWidth;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            let h = video.videoHeight;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            if (w > maxDimension || h > maxDimension) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              const ratio = w / h;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              if (w > h) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                w = maxDimension;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                h = Math.round(maxDimension / ratio);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              } else {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                h = maxDimension;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                w = Math.round(maxDimension * ratio);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            if (w > 0 && h > 0) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              canvas.width = w;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              canvas.height = h;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              // Draw the entire video frame scaled down (no lag, full coverage)
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              ctx.drawImage(video, 0, 0, w, h);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              const qrCode = jsQR(imageData.data, imageData.width, imageData.height, {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                inversionAttempts: 'attemptBoth'
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              });
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:   
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              if (qrCode && qrCode.data) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                const scannedText = qrCode.data.trim();
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                // Scan-lock: Prevent triggering multiple scans for the same code while processing delay is active
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                if (lockCodeRef.current === scannedText) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(scanQRCodeLoop);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  return;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                // Set scan-lock code
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                lockCodeRef.current = scannedText;
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                console.log("Scanned QR Text Successfully:", scannedText);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                // Try to find the matching guest
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                const matchedGuest = matchGuestFromScannedText(scannedText);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                if (matchedGuest) {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  triggerScanResult(matchedGuest);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                } else {
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  // Only trigger error if the scanned QR code is unique/different to prevent immediate loops
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                  triggerScanResult(null, true, `Msimbo wa QR ulioskaniwa (${scannedText}) haujasajiliwa kwani si wa mwaliko wetu.`);
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:                }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:              }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:            }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:          }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:        }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      } catch (loopErr) {

src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      }
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:
src/components/QRScanner.tsx:      animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(scanQRCodeLoop);

src/components/SaveTheDateManager.tsx:        .replace(/{name}/g, guestCleanName)

src/components/SaveTheDateManager.tsx:    } catch (e) {

src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    // Dynamically adjust batch size to ensure a smooth visual countdown with percentages
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    let BATCH_SIZE = 15;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    if (newGuestsList.length <= 10) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      BATCH_SIZE = 1; // 1 by 1 for small lists, elegant counting
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    } else if (newGuestsList.length <= 30) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      BATCH_SIZE = 3;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    } else if (newGuestsList.length <= 100) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      BATCH_SIZE = 10;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    } else if (newGuestsList.length <= 500) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      BATCH_SIZE = 25;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    } else {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      BATCH_SIZE = 50; // default for very large lists
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    }
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    const totalToUpload = newGuestsList.length;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    let currentMerged = [...guests];
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    try {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      let currentProgressVal = 1;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < totalToUpload; i += BATCH_SIZE) {

src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:  // Handler for parsing raw CSV file content
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:  const parseCSVFileContent = (content: string) => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    setCsvError('');
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    const lines = content.split(/\r?\n/);
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    const matchedList: { name: string; phone: string; cardType: string }[] = [];
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    const splitCSVLine = (line: string): string[] => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      const result: string[] = [];
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      let cell = '';
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      let inQuotes = false;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:        const char = line[i];
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:        if (char === '"') {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:          inQuotes = !inQuotes;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:        } else if (char === ',' && !inQuotes) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:          result.push(cell.trim());
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:          cell = '';
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:        } else {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:          cell += char;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:        }
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      }
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      result.push(cell.trim());
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      return result;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    };
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:    lines.forEach((line) => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      if (!line.trim()) return;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:      const parts = splitCSVLine(line);
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:

src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:        return lower.includes('jina') || lower.includes('name') || lower.includes('phone') || lower.includes('simu') || lower.includes('aina') || lower.includes('type') || lower.includes('mgeni');

src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:          // Automatically trigger print dialog when all card images are loaded completely
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:          window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:            setTimeout(() => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:              const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.card-image');
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:              let loadedCount = 0;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:              if (imgs.length === 0) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                window.print();
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:              } else {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                imgs.forEach(img => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                  if (img.complete) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                    loadedCount++;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                    if (loadedCount === imgs.length) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                      window.print();
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                    }
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                  } else {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                    img.addEventListener('load', () => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                      loadedCount++;
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                      if (loadedCount === imgs.length) {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                        window.print();
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                      }
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                    });
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                    img.addEventListener('error', () => {
src/components/UploadGuests.tsx:                      loadedCount++;

src/db/index.ts:import { Pool } from "pg";
src/db/index.ts:import * as schema from "./schema.ts";
src/db/index.ts:
src/db/index.ts:export const createPool = () => {
src/db/index.ts:  const databaseUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL || process.env.SQL_DATABASE_URL;
src/db/index.ts:
src/db/index.ts:  if (databaseUrl) {
src/db/index.ts:    console.log("[Database] Connecting using connection string (DATABASE_URL)...");
src/db/index.ts:    const isLocal = databaseUrl.includes("localhost") || databaseUrl.includes("127.0.0.1");
src/db/index.ts:    return new Pool({
src/db/index.ts:      connectionString: databaseUrl,
src/db/index.ts:      ssl: isLocal ? false : { rejectUnauthorized: false },
src/db/index.ts:      connectionTimeoutMillis: 15000,
src/db/index.ts:      idleTimeoutMillis: 10000,
src/db/index.ts:      max: 10,
src/db/index.ts:      keepAlive: true,
src/db/index.ts:    });
src/db/index.ts:  }
src/db/index.ts:
src/db/index.ts:  const host = process.env.SQL_HOST;
src/db/index.ts:  const user = process.env.SQL_USER;
src/db/index.ts:  const password = process.env.SQL_PASSWORD;
src/db/index.ts:  const database = process.env.SQL_DB_NAME;
src/db/index.ts:
src/db/index.ts:  if (!host) {
src/db/index.ts:    console.warn("[Database] SQL_HOST and DATABASE_URL are missing. Fallback to local storage expected.");
src/db/index.ts:  } else {
src/db/index.ts:    console.log(`[Database] Connecting to Postgres at ${host} as ${user} (DB: ${database})`);
src/db/index.ts:  }
src/db/index.ts:
src/db/index.ts:  const isUnixSocket = host && host.startsWith("/");

src/db/index.ts:    host,
src/db/index.ts:    port: 5432,
src/db/index.ts:    user,
src/db/index.ts:    password,
src/db/index.ts:    database: database || "postgres",
src/db/index.ts:    ssl: isUnixSocket ? false : (host ? { rejectUnauthorized: false } : false),
src/db/index.ts:    connectionTimeoutMillis: 30000,
src/db/index.ts:    idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,
src/db/index.ts:    max: 15,
src/db/index.ts:    keepAlive: true,
src/db/index.ts:  });

src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:// Robust Error Handling Wrappers
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:const wait = (ms: number) => new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, ms));
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:function hasConnectionError(error: any): boolean {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  if (!error) return false;
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  const msg = String(error.message || "").toLowerCase();
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  const causeMsg = error.cause ? String(error.cause.message || "").toLowerCase() : "";
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  const stackMsg = String(error.stack || "").toLowerCase();
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  const searchStr = `${msg} ${causeMsg} ${stackMsg}`;
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  return (
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("connection terminated") ||
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("econnreset") ||
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("timeout") ||
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("etimedout") ||
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("connection closed") ||
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("unexpected termination") ||
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("ssl syscall error") ||
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    searchStr.includes("broken pipe")
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  );
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:}
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:async function executeQuery<T>(label: string, queryFn: () => Promise<T>, retries = 3): Promise<T> {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= retries; attempt++) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    try {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      return await queryFn();
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      const isConnectionDrop = hasConnectionError(error);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      if (isConnectionDrop && attempt < retries) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        console.warn(`[CloudSQL] ${label} failed (attempt ${attempt}): ${error.message}. Retrying in ${attempt * 1500}ms...`);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        await wait(attempt * 1500);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        continue;
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      }
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      console.error(`[CloudSQL Error] ${label} failed on attempt ${attempt}:`, error);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      throw new Error(`Database operation '${label}' failed. Please try again later.`, { cause: error });
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    }
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  }
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  throw new Error(`Database operation '${label}' failed after ${retries} attempts.`);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:}
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:

src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    // Check if events or guests are already populated
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    const eventCount = await db.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` }).from(schema.events);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    const guestCount = await db.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` }).from(schema.guests);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    const countEvents = Number(eventCount[0]?.count || 0);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    const countGuests = Number(guestCount[0]?.count || 0);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    if (countEvents > 0 || countGuests > 0) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      console.log(`[SQL Seeder] Tables are already populated (events: ${countEvents}, guests: ${countGuests}). Skipping migration.`);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      return false;

src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:// 3. Robust Relational Upsert function
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:export async function syncStateToRelationalDB(data: any): Promise<void> {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:  await executeQuery("syncStateToRelationalDB", async () => {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    // 3.1. Save events (from eventsList or single eventDetails) (BATCHED)
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    const eventsToSync: any[] = [];
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    if (data.eventsList && Array.isArray(data.eventsList)) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      eventsToSync.push(...data.eventsList);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    }
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    if (data.eventDetails && data.eventDetails.id) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      // Add individual eventDetails if not redundant
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      if (!eventsToSync.some(ev => ev.id === data.eventDetails.id)) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        eventsToSync.push(data.eventDetails);
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      }
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    }
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:    if (eventsToSync.length > 0) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      const values = eventsToSync
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        .filter((ev: any) => ev.id)
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        .map((ev: any) => ({
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          id: String(ev.id),
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          senderId: ev.senderId ? String(ev.senderId) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          name: String(ev.name || "Sherehe"),
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          date: ev.date ? String(ev.date) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          time: ev.time ? String(ev.time) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          period: ev.period ? String(ev.period) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          eventHallName: ev.eventHallName ? String(ev.eventHallName) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          coordinates: ev.coordinates ? String(ev.coordinates) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          hostName: ev.hostName ? String(ev.hostName) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          dressCode: ev.dressCode ? String(ev.dressCode) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          contact1: ev.contact1 ? String(ev.contact1) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          contact1Name: ev.contact1Name ? String(ev.contact1Name) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          contact2: ev.contact2 ? String(ev.contact2) : null,

src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          mapsLink: ev.mapsLink ? String(ev.mapsLink) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          eventImgUrl: ev.eventImgUrl ? String(ev.eventImgUrl) : null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          messageLogs: ev.messageLogs || null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          smsTemplates: ev.smsTemplates || null,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          contributionsEnabled: ev.contributionsEnabled === true,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          fundraisingGoal: typeof ev.fundraisingGoal === "number" ? ev.fundraisingGoal : 0,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          autoRsvpRemindersEnabled: ev.autoRsvpRemindersEnabled === true,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        }));
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:      if (values.length > 0) {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:        await db.insert(schema.events).values(values).onConflictDoUpdate({
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          target: schema.events.id,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:          set: {
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:            senderId: sql`EXCLUDED.sender_id`,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:            name: sql`EXCLUDED.name`,
src/db/cloudsql-core.ts:            date: sql`EXCLUDED.date`,
